page_title: List of Bizarre Titan (Attack on Titan 2 Game)
text:
Bizarre Titan is a type of Titan that can only be captured manually, activating the policy "Form Titan Capturing Squad" will not automatically capture any Bizarre Titan even if it is the only missing Titan type left uncaptured.

 

Bizarre Titan 1

Slot 1 (Armored Titan) - Spawn as Dire Elimination Targets in Story Mode mission The Scout Regiment.

Slot 2 (Female Titan) - Spawn as Dire Elimination Targets in Story Mode mission Titan Capture Operation.

Slot 3 (Beast Titan) - Spawn as Dire Elimination Targets in Story Mode mission Experiment.

Slot 4 (Jaw Titan) - Spawn as Dire Elimination Targets in Story Mode mission Supply Base Construction.

Slot 5 (Cart Titan) - Spawn in Final Missions in Territory Recovery Mode strategic point Supply Base Defense within Wasteland region.
 

Bizarre Titan 2

Slot 1 (Armored Titan) - Spawn as Dire Elimination Targets in Story Mode mission Sacrifice.

Slot 2 (Female Titan) - Spawn as Dire Elimination Targets in Story Mode mission The 57th Expedition Beyond the Walls.

Slot 3 (Beast Titan) - Spawn as Dire Elimination Targets in Story Mode mission Female Titan.

Slot 4 (Jaw Titan) - Spawn as Dire Elimination Targets in Story Mode mission Bite.

Slot 5 (Cart Titan) - Spawn in Final Missions in Territory Recovery Mode strategic point Scout Base Reconstruction within Ruins region.
 

Bizarre Titan 3

Slot 1 (Armored Titan) - Spawn as Dire Elimination Targets in Story Mode mission Beast Titan.

Slot 2 (Female Titan) - Spawn as Dire Elimination Targets in Story Mode mission Utgard Castle.

Slot 3 (Beast Titan) - Spawn as Dire Elimination Targets in Story Mode mission Soldier's Dance.

Slot 4 (Jaw Titan) - Spawn as Dire Elimination Targets in Story Mode mission Choices and Consequences.

Slot 5 (Cart Titan) - Spawn in Final Missions in Territory Recovery Mode strategic point Cornered Rat Op within Titan Infested Forest region.
 

Bizarre Titan 4

Slot 1 (Armored Titan) - Spawn as Dire Elimination Targets in Story Mode mission The Eastern Line.

Slot 2 (Female Titan) - Spawn as Dire Elimination Targets in Story Mode mission Nameless Hero.

Slot 3 (Beast Titan) - Spawn as Dire Elimination Targets in Story Mode mission Charge.

Slot 4 (Jaw Titan) - Spawn as Dire Elimination Targets in Story Mode mission I'm Home.

Slot 5 (Cart Titan) - Spawn as Dire Elimination Targets in Territory Recovery Mode strategic point Castle Rescue Op within Green Meadows region.
 

Bizarre Titan 5

Slot 1 (Armored Titan) - Spawn as Dire Elimination Targets in Story Mode mission True Name.

Slot 2 (Female Titan) - Spawn as Dire Elimination Targets in Story Mode mission Primal Desire.

Slot 3 (Beast Titan) - Spawn as Dire Elimination Targets in Story Mode mission Scream.

Slot 4 (Jaw Titan) - Spawn as Dire Elimination Targets in Story Mode mission Treacherous Soldier.

Slot 5 (Cart Titan) - Spawn as Dire Elimination Targets in Territory Recovery Mode strategic point Cavern Escape within Ruins region.

WARNING-The Colossal bizarre titan only spawns in the second victory dlc quest!
